news.paragraph: Technology stocks are showing positive momentum, with sector updates noting gains during the Wednesday afternoon session. Despite hot PPI data, the Nasdaq 100 is rising and Nvidia has reached a record high. Traders should monitor this sector-wide strength and the broader market's reaction to inflation data.
